// BAD: public API with raw boolean mode switch
pub fn process_data(data: &[u8], compress: bool, encrypt: bool) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut result = data.to_vec();
    if compress {
        result = compress_data(&result);
    }
    if encrypt {
        result = encrypt_data(&result);
    }
    result
}

pub fn connect(host: &str, tls: bool, verify: bool) -> Connection {
    if tls {
        if verify {
            connect_tls_verified(host)
        } else {
            connect_tls_unverified(host)
        }
    } else {
        connect_plain(host)
    }
}

pub fn create_pool(size: usize, reuse: bool) -> Pool {
    if reuse {
        Pool::with_reuse(size)
    } else {
        Pool::new(size)
    }
}
